2371600.name: Gravelight
2371600.description:
The night the festival began, the world should have stayed bright.

Bo is just a kid from a small village — not a warrior, not a hero, not anyone the world would normally choose. But Bo has visions: flashes of a future where everything breaks apart, where a crowned ruler watches the land fall into ruin, and where a forgotten god marks the end with a rune burned into the dark.

Combat System

Gravelight’s combat is fast and melee-focused: smooth, responsive hits with satisfying knockback keep you moving. Spells are rare but devastating—mana is earned through melee pressure, not passive regen, so every cast is a choice. Elemental crystals unlock powerful abilities and upgrades, letting you shape your build with meaningful decisions and high-stakes fights.

Key Features

  • Open-World Top-Down RPG (Pixel Art): Explore a living world scarred by collapse, secrets, and supernatural events.

  • Two Realities to Traverse: Move between the real world and the forbidden Shadowworld — each with its own dangers, resources, and truths.

  • Combat Against Rift Creatures: Fight shadow-born monsters that infest your village and roam the land beyond.

  • Rebuild and Upgrade a Lost Home: The Shadowworld village becomes your anchor — a place to grow, improve, and bring hope back piece by piece.

  • Vision-Driven Storytelling: Uncover the mystery of the crystal, the rune, and the crowned ruler destined to destroy everything.

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
